title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models for chat, completion, and embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-ui)
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; runs entirely in-browser with local API calls.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient interactive CLI wrapper around the Ollama REST API with history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs or text.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama supporting sync/async, streaming, and embeddings.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that answers prompts via local Ollama models.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flask/React GUI for chatting with Ollama models in a browser tab.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate code or documentation using local Ollama models without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant sidebar powered by Ollama.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets workspace members chat with an Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot using python-telegram-bot to serve local Ollama completions in any chat.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama as a service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-backed process management and streaming.
